kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: The artisan serving the Knight and the artisan in Southgate are in different guilds.
Godfrey goes with at least one of Tapestries, Duke, or Knight.
Aldric's levy is between the Fletcher and the artisan serving the Duke.
Beatrix's levy is higher than both the artisan who makes Horseshoes and the artisan serving the Countess.
The artisan who makes Pottery's levy is exactly 2 coins more than the Potter.
The artisan in Southgate's levy is exactly 2 coins more than the artisan serving the Countess.
The Blacksmith's levy is immediately next to Wulfric.
The artisan serving the Countess' levy is lower than both the artisan who makes Pottery and the artisan in Millpond.
The artisan serving the Duke's levy is between the artisan in Millpond and the Weaver.
Everyone in the Hill Ward ranks higher in levy than everyone in the River Ward.

fishing.name: The Fishing Derby
fishing.description: Anglers at the lake-country derby each landed a different fish from a different pond on a different lure. Work out who caught what, and where.
clues: The angler fishing with Nightcrawler and the angler at Willowmere are in different families.
Gus goes with at least one of Wobbler, Minnow, or Nightcrawler.
Cody's weight is between the angler who landed the Catfish and the angler fishing with Minnow.
Dale's weight is higher than both the angler using the Crankbait and the angler fishing with Leech.
The angler using the Spinnerbait's weight is exactly 4 lb more than the angler who landed the Crappie.
The angler at Willowmere's weight is exactly 4 lb more than the angler fishing with Leech.
The angler who landed the Bass' weight is immediately next to Royce.
The angler fishing with Leech's weight is lower than both the angler using the Spinnerbait and the angler at Pinehollow.
The angler fishing with Minnow's weight is between the angler at Pinehollow and the angler who landed the Perch.
Everyone in the South Watershed ranks higher in weight than everyone in the North Watershed.
